summary: AWS Certified Java Developer with hands-on experience building production-grade Spring Boot microservices. Architected CloudSentry — an AI-powered DevOps observability platform with Kafka streaming, Redis caching, and role-based dashboards. Strong in Java 17, Spring Security, JPA/Hibernate, REST APIs, and event-driven architecture. Founded a consultancy delivering 6 client projects with 100% satisfaction.
certifications: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) | Amazon Web Services

projects.title: CloudSentry | AI-Powered DevOps Incident & Cost Optimization Platform
projects.description: Architected production-grade observability platform combining features of Datadog + PagerDuty + AWS Cost Explorer. Built real-time metrics ingestion via Kafka streams tracking CPU, memory, latency, and error rates. Implemented anomaly detection engine with statistical + rule-based analysis and predictive insights. Developed automated incident management with intelligent severity calculation and lifecycle tracking. Engineered AI Root Cause Analysis module using configurable rule engine with optional LLM integration. Built cloud cost analyzer with AWS SDK v2 for cost tracking, utilization monitoring, and optimization recommendations. Designed multi-channel notification engine (Email, Slack, Webhook) with deduplication and escalation policies. Implemented JWT authentication + RBAC with role-based dashboards for Admin, SRE, Developer, and Manager. Used Spring Data JPA, Redis caching, and Kafka consumers with Docker Compose for infrastructure.

projects.title: PlatePal | Full-Stack Food Ordering Platform
projects.description: Built Zomato-like platform with interfaces for customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and admins. Implemented real-time order tracking via WebSockets and mock payment integration. Developed role-based dashboards with order management and analytics for each user type.

projects.title: Placement Management System
projects.description: Built campus recruitment platform automating workflows for students, companies, and TPO. Implemented role-based access, job posting, application tracking — eliminated 70% manual work.
